# Heyotis — full content snapshot

> Placeholder. This file should contain the full plain-text content of every public marketing page so that AI assistants without live-crawl access can reason over the complete site. Regenerate it whenever marketing copy changes.
>
> Suggested generator: a build-time script that walks the (marketing) route group + content/blog and concatenates rendered Markdown into this file. Wire into the `build` script before shipping.

## /
Heyotis home page content goes here.

## /features
Heyotis features page content goes here.

## /pricing
Heyotis pricing page content goes here.

## /about
Heyotis about page content goes here.

## /blog
Heyotis blog index content goes here. Then each post appended below.
